Trusted Miami Pool Service Experts

Miami's Pool Care Experts

Specializing in South Florida's unique pool maintenance needs. From saltwater systems to hurricane prep, we know these waters.

Family Owned & Operated Industry Certified 16+ Years of Experience 5.0 Rating
5.0 5.0 A+
Verified Reviews

Get a Free Estimate

What Your Neighbors Have to Say

Read More Reviews →
M
Marcella R.

After Irma destroyed our neighbor's pool equipment, we hired Apex to secure ours. Their aircraft cable system held through Category 3 winds last season. Worth every penny for peace of mind.

T
Theo B.

Our Bal Harbour condo's salt system kept failing under other companies. Apex diagnosed the issue - salt creep from ocean spray was shorting the control board. Their marine-grade enclosure solution has worked flawlessly for 18 months.

G
Gabriela C.

The team restored our 1926 Coral Gables pool's original Venetian glass mosaic to museum quality. They even sourced matching tiles for three damaged pieces we thought were irreplaceable.

R
Raj P.

Now I can check my Weston pool chemistry from Boston and get alerts if the pH drifts. The variable speed pump cut our electric bill by $120/month - it paid for itself in one season.

Apex Pool Service — Certified Professionals

Our team brings certified expertise and years of experience to every pool service project. We stand behind our work with comprehensive warranties and a commitment to quality.

More About Us →

The Apex Pool Service Way

Our proven process ensures every project is completed with precision, transparency, and care.

1

Consultation

We start with a thorough, no-obligation assessment. Our certified team evaluates your needs and provides a detailed report with recommendations.

2

Plan & Prepare

We work with you to determine the best approach for your specific pool service needs. Our experts ensure the right plan for quality results.

3

Get It Done

Our skilled team gets to work with precision and efficiency. We maintain a clean, organized environment and keep you informed every step of the way.

4

Quality Check

Before we consider any job complete, our team performs a comprehensive quality review. We verify every detail meets our exacting standards.

5

Wrap Up

Transparent pricing with no surprises. You only pay when you're 100% satisfied with the work. We offer flexible options to make the process seamless.

Proudly Serving Miami & Beyond

As a locally owned and operated company, we're proud to serve customers throughout Miami, FL and the surrounding communities. Our team brings local expertise and dedication to every project.

Fort Lauderdale Coral Springs Pembroke Pines Boca Raton West Palm Beach Hollywood Delray Beach Pompano Beach
Let's Get Started →

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our pool service services.

How often should salt cells be cleaned in Miami?

Every 2 months minimum - our humidity causes faster calcium buildup than drier climates. Waterfront homes may need monthly cleaning during summer.

Do you service commercial saltwater pools?

Yes, we maintain several South Beach hotel pools with systems up to 50,000 gallons. Commercial accounts receive after-hours service to avoid guest disruption.

Built on Miami Values

Schedule your pool assessment today. We serve all Miami-Dade and Broward counties.

Let's Begin →
